fields.name: severity
fields.comment: Finding severity: PASSED, WARNING, or FAILURE

fields.name: source
fields.comment: Source of the check, e.g. 'RAG policy', 'cross-reference check'

fields.name: documentTypeKey
fields.comment: If this finding requires the supplier to upload a document or certificate, provide a key identifying what to upload. Use CERTIFICATION:<NAME> for any certificate type (e.g. CERTIFICATION:ISO_9001, CERTIFICATION:BRC_FOOD, CERTIFICATION:OHSAS_18001). Use DOCUMENT:<NAME> for any other document (e.g. DOCUMENT:ANNUAL_REPORT, DOCUMENT:BANK_STATEMENT, DOCUMENT:COMMERCIAL_REGISTER). Derive NAME freely from context — do NOT limit to any fixed list. Leave null only for non-document findings such as duplicate checks or general data issues.

fields.name: score
fields.comment: Points deducted from the compliance score by this finding. 0 for PASSED, half the rule deduction for WARNING, full rule deduction for FAILURE.

fields.name: riskType
fields.comment: The type of risk this finding relates to: FINANCIAL_STABILITY, POLICY_COMPLIANCE, or CERTIFICATION_VALIDITY

fields.name: riskKind
fields.comment: The kind of check that produced this finding: MISSING_DOC or AI_VALIDATION
